title: Hero Banner

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: heading
fields.instructions: Main H1 heading for the hero. Keep under 12 words. Example: "Design-led WordPress, powered by AI."

fields.label: Subheading
fields.name: subheading
fields.instructions: Supporting body text below the heading. Keep to 1–2 sentences (max 200 chars).
fields.placeholder: We combine design thinking, data insight and AI-enhanced delivery to build WordPress platforms that perform.

fields.label: Primary CTA
fields.name: cta_primary
fields.instructions: Primary action button (coral background). Example: "Start a project" → /contact

fields.label: Secondary CTA
fields.name: cta_secondary
fields.instructions: Secondary action button (white background). Leave blank to hide. Example: "Book a 30-min strategy session"

fields.label: Background Image
fields.name: background_image
fields.instructions: Optional hero background image. Recommended: 1440×810px, WebP or JPG. Appears on the right side of the hero with a dark overlay.

description: Fields for the Wordie Hero Banner block.
